name: Nikolai Krol
description:
You're one of the new workers in the Echo's Quartz mines, slowly getting to know everyone amongst the miners, one in particular though seemed to have caught some interest in you...


Nikolai from the furry VN "The Smoke Room"
⚠️kinks warnings.⚠️
Requested by: @Fluffypolarbear27
Artist: @Juggermelon
(This is like my third attempt at making a character from already established media 💀I still hope he turns out alright)
creator: xSimonx
